title: Secretaries and Administrative Assistants, Except Legal, Medical, and Executive
description: Perform routine administrative functions such as drafting correspondence, scheduling appointments, organizing and maintaining paper and electronic files, or providing information to callers.

tasks.text: Answer telephones and give information to callers, take messages, or transfer calls to appropriate individuals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet visitors or callers and handle their inquiries or direct them to the appropriate persons according to their needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create, maintain, and enter information into databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use computers for various applications, such as database management or word processing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate office equipment, such as fax machines, copiers, or phone systems and arrange for repairs when equipment malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and manage paper or electronic filing systems, recording information, updating paperwork, or maintaining documents, such as attendance records, correspondence, or other material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate electronic mail systems and coordinate the flow of information, internally or with other organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule and confirm appointments for clients, customers, or supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain scheduling and event calendars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compose, type, and distribute meeting notes, routine correspondence, or reports, such as presentations or expense, statistical, or monthly reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Complete forms in accordance with company procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and attach appropriate files to incoming correspondence requiring replies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct searches to find needed information, using such sources as the Internet.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open, read, route, and distribute incoming mail or other materials and answer routine letters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review work done by others to check for correct spelling and grammar, ensure that company format policies are followed, and recommend revisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Make copies of correspondence or other printed material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Learn to operate new office technologies as they are developed and implemented.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train and assist staff with computer usage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order and dispense supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare conference or event materials, such as flyers or invitations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform payroll functions, such as maintaining timekeeping information and processing and submitting payroll.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and deposit money into accounts, disburse funds from cash accounts to pay bills or invoices, keep records of collections and disbursements, and ensure accounts are balanced.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Establish work procedures or schedules and keep track of the daily work of clerical staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide services to customers, such as order placement or account information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and mail checks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange conference, meeting, or travel reservations for office personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise other clerical staff and provide training and orientation to new staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage projects or contribute to committee or team work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate conferences, meetings, or special events, such as luncheons or graduation ceremonies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mail newsletters, promotional material, or other information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or maintain internal or external company Web sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
